summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Alpha Blue Capital US Small-Mid Cap Dynamic ETF (ABCS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that aims for long-term capital appreciation by investing in US small- and mid-cap stocks and ETFs. ABCS was launched on Dec 20, 2023 and is issued by Alpha Blue Capital.

data.title: Alpha Blue Capital Management LP Enters Active ETF Space: Launches Alpha Blue Capital US Small-Mid Cap Dynamic ETF
data.text: GREENBRAE, Calif. , Dec. 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Alpha Blue Capital Management LP is pleased to announce the launch of Alpha Blue Capital US Small-Mid Cap Dynamic ETF listed on the NASDAQ with the ti...

news.t: Alpha Blue Capital Management LP Enters Active ETF Space: Launches Alpha Blue Capital US Small-Mid Cap Dynamic ETF

holdings.infoBox: ABCS is an equity ETF with a total of 106 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vanguard Small Cap Value ETF stock at 14.63%, Vanguard Small-Cap ETF at 5.30%, Vanguard Mid-Cap Value ETF at 5.10%, Vanguard Mid-Cap ETF at 4.95%, and Elevance Health at 2.31%.
